description_long: This is a cylindrical wooden barrel with a rich, reddish-brown finish and visible wood grain texture. The barrel is adorned with decorative green scrollwork encircling its upper section, bordered by dark metal bands that provide structural reinforcement. On the front, there is a large, circular painted medallion featuring a still-life image of a vase with flowers and fruit, giving the barrel an ornate and possibly antique appearance. The top surface is flat and matches the wood grain and color of the sides, suggesting it could be used as a small table or storage container. There are no visible handles or openings, and the construction appears solid and robust. The overall design suggests it is both decorative and functional, suitable for use in urban or garden settings.
description: A decorative, cylindrical wooden barrel with a reddish finish, green scrollwork, and a painted floral medallion on the front. Reinforced with dark metal bands, it has a flat top and an ornate, antique look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the painted floral medallion, green scrollwork, and metal bands on the reddish wood surface.
description_view_1: Side view with only the green scrollwork and metal bands visible; the medallion is not in sight.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying uninterrupted reddish wood, green scrollwork, and metal bands, with no medallion or markings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing only the scrollwork and bands, with no medallion.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: metal hoops at top, middle, and bottom
